trigger_reason: The AI prioritizes narrative structure and executive summaries over raw data validation and deep-dive technical evidence, leading to 'hollow' reports that look good but lack substance.
improvements: Require 'Artifact Attribution' where every finding must map to a specific memory-dump-offset or PID context, explicitly forbidding the reliance on summary-level logs when memory artifacts are available.

Implement 'Forensic-Gating': If 'memory_metadata' fails to capture the PID, the system must trigger an 'Artifact Gaps' warning and force the inclusion of a specific raw log correlation ID to replace missing forensic context.

checklist.note: Raw JSON block required for all external entities; qualitative summaries of reputation checks are forbidden.
Mandatory analysis of memory segments; if PID is null, report must provide the raw memory-query-string and the specific error code returned.
Every assertion must be linked to an Evidence Object ID (EOID) and its corresponding raw source telemetry link.
ISO 8601 chronological sequence with 1:1 mapping to EOIDs to prove data parity.
